plugins.name: titon
plugins.description: AI-first interface for dapp authors building on the Titon network. Slash commands for Kronos automation (recurring on-chain jobs, TSA-audited — zero findings) and Fortuna threshold-BLS VRF (verifiable randomness, TSA-audited — zero findings). Skills ship in TypeScript and Python flavours — every TS recipe has a parallel `*-python` skill backed by titon-network-{kronos,fortuna}-sdk on PyPI. Auto-loads the right recipe when your conversation matches. More dev-facing protocols as they ship.
